paragraph: The single-family market in Haworth is moving briskly. Twenty homes sold over the last eight months at a median of $1,437,500, with a median days on market of 13 days and 55 percent of sales closing above asking price. The sale-to-list ratio sits at 1.007, meaning homes are fetching their asking price or slightly better when they hit the market. Sellers aren't overasking here. Priced homes are moving, and the market rewards accurate pricing with quick sale timelines. The range runs wide, from $574,000 to $3,225,000, which reflects Haworth's mix of renovation candidates alongside established estate homes. If you're looking at Haworth, you're entering a market where homes at the right price don't linger.
